verses.text: Ahi zongin gamhluah ding tapa in a pa' neihsa khempeuh a luah ding hinapi-in a neulai hun sungteng silate mah bangin bangmah thu neilo hi
A pa in ama gamhluah dingteng a piakma, a neulai hun sungteng, midang in tua naupang kemin a vai ding a hawmsak hi
Tua mah bangin eite zong kha thu-ah i neulai hun sungteng huihlak a uk vangneite' khutnuai-ah a om ihi hi

Ahi zongin a hun a cin ciangin eite khempeuh Pasian' tate i suahtheihna dingin Thukham nuai-ah a om mite a hong tankhia dingin Pasian in a Tapa hong paisak a, tua Tapa pen leitung ngeina bangin numei sung panin hong suakin, Jew Thukham sungah hong nungta hi
Note pen ama tate na hihna uh a hong lahna dingin Pasian in ama Tapa' Kha Siangtho, eite sungah hong tumsak a, tua Kha Siangtho in Pasian pen, “Pa aw, pa aw,” hong cisak hi
Tua ahih manin note pen sila hi nawnloin Pasian' tate na hih manun Pasian in ama tate-a' dingin a koih khempeuh, note tungah hong pia ding hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Galati mite-a' ding Paul A Lunghihmawhna

verses.text: A beisa hunah Pasian theilo na hih manun Pasian a hilo vangliatna a neite' sila-in na om uh hi

Ahi zongin note in tu-in Pasian meltheih khinin, tua ahih kei leh Pasian in note hong meltheih khinta ahih manin, a bang hangin bangmah a hih zolo, a ginalo tua bangte lamah kiheikik nuam a, sila va suakkik nuam na hi uh hiam
Note in nite, khate, hunte, kumte-a kipan pawi tuamtuamte limtakin tan'ding na hah ngaihsut mahmah uh hi
Tua ahih manin note-a' dingin ka nasepna khempeuh a mawkna a suahkhak ding ka hong lunghihmawhsak mahmah hi

Sanggamte aw, Thukham thu tawh kisai-in note' gamtat bangin ka hong gamtat mah bangin kei' gamtat mah bangin na hong gamtat ding uh ka hong thum hi. A beisa hunah kei tungah na hong gamta khial nai kei uh hi
Note kiangah lungdamna thu hilh ding ka hong kipatna pen ka pumpi cidam lohna hang ahihna thu na theihsa uh ahi hi

Ka pumpi cidam lohna pen note-a' dingin thu haksapi hinapi-in kei na hong simmawhbawl tuan kei uh a, zong na hong nolh tuan kei uh hi. Vantung panin a hong pai vantung mi zin do bang, leh Khrih Jesuh mahmah zin a do bangin na hong limbawl uh hi
Tua hun laitakin lungdam mahmah napi-in tu-in a bangci ta na hi uh hiam? A hithei khat hi leh, tua hunin na mittang nangawn uh khelkhia-in kei a hong pianuamte na hihna uh teltakin ka thei hi
Note kiangah thuman ka hong genna hangin kei a hong galbawl na hi uh hiam

Tua mi pawlkhatte in note hong engin hong kin mahmah uh hi; ahi zongin amaute' ngimna a hoih hi khollo hi. Amaute' hong kin bangin note in zong amaute kinin na kipawl theihna dingun kei kiang panin note a hong khenkhia nuam ahi lel uh hi
Ngimna hoih nei ahih nak uh leh note' phattuamna ding kinna pen note tawh ka hong omkhawm sung bek hiloin, a tawntungin kin ding a hoih ahi hi
Taneute aw, note in Khrih' pianzia bang na neih dong uh, naupai nupi in ta a suahding a gimpih bangin note ka hong lunggimpih ding hi
Note in ka maisuah na muhtheihna dingun hithei hi leh note tawh ka omkhawm nuam mahmah hi. Tu-in note ka hong lunghimawh mahmah hi.
Thukham nuai-ah a omnuam mite aw, Thukham in a gen thu a tel taktak mah na hi uh hiam
Lai Siangtho sungah hih bangin na kigelh hi: Abraham in tapa nih nei a, khat pen a zi' silanu tawh a neih a tapa hi a, a khat pen a zi tawh a neih a tapa ahi hi
Silanu tawh a neih a tapa pen leitung ngeina bangin a suak mawkmawk hi a, ahi zongin a zi tawh a neih a tapa pen Pasian' thuciamna tawh kizui-in a suak ahi hi
Hihte pen gentehna lim ahi hi. Hih nupi nihte pen thuciamna nam nih a lahna ahi hi. Sila a suak tate a hingkhia nu Hagar hi a, Sinai Mual tunga kipia thuciamna a lahnopna ahi hi
Arabia gama om Sinai Mual lim ahi Hagar pen tu laitakin a mite tawh salin a om Jerusalem khuapi a cihnopna ahi hi
Ahi zongin vantung Jerusalem pen sal hilo a, eite' pian'na nu ahi hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho sungah, “A ciing nupi aw, lungdam in. Nausuah natna a thei ngeilo nupi aw, nuamin kiko in. Bang hang hiam cih leh a pasal in a nusiat nupi in a pasal tawh a om tawntung nupi sangin ta hauzaw ding hi,” ci-in na kigelh hi
Tu-in eite zong, Isaac mah bangin Pasian' thuciamna hangin a piang tate ihi hi
Tua hun laitakin leitung ngeina bangin a piang mawkmawk tapa in Pasian Kha Siangtho hangin a piang tapa a bawlsiat mah bangin, tuhunin zong eite hong kibawlsia hi
Ahi zongin Lai Siangtho sungah, “Sila numei' tapa in sila a hilo numei' tapa tawh gamh luahkhawm theilo ding ahih manin, sila numei leh a tapa hawlkhia in,” na kici hi
Tua ahih manin sanggamte aw, eite pen sila numei' tate ihi kei a, sila a hilo numei' tate ihi hi.
